channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] RESIDENTS → KYIV : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Kyiv, Kyyiv, Misto, Ukraine)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RESIDENTS / KYIV. Location: Kyiv, Kyyiv, Misto, Ukraine. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] LEBANON → VILLAGE : Fight with artillery and tanks (Beirut, Beyrouth, Lebanon)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: LEBANON / VILLAGE. Location: Beirut, Beyrouth, Lebanon. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: CORRESPONDENT / PRODUCER. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / WASHINGTON. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.
